message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber 0

title Circuit Breaker Pattern

participant "A" as A
participant "CircuitBreaker" as CB
participant "B" as B

rectangle {
    alt [no errors]
        A -> CB: call()
        activate CB
        CB -> B: call()
        activate B
        B --> CB: response
        deactivate B
        CB --> A: response
        deactivate CB
    else [errors]
        A -> CB: call()
        activate CB
        
        loop while err_count < max_errors
            CB -> B: call()
            destroy B
            
            CB -> CB: err_count ++
            activate CB
            deactivate CB
        end
        
        CB -> CB: sleep(timeout)
        activate CB
        deactivate CB
        
        CB -> B: call()
        destroy B
        
        CB -> CB: sleep(timeout*2)
        activate CB
        deactivate CB
        
        CB -> B: call()
        destroy B
        
        CB --> A: error
        deactivate CB
    end
}

@enduml
```
